title: HUD, Text, Menus, Focus, Multichannel Cues, and Motion Settings · Spiral Review
summary: A delayed playtest review reconstructs hud, text, menus, focus, multichannel cues, and motion settings from revision, seed, input frames, simulation snapshots, draw records, audio cues, accessibility settings, profiles, package artifacts, and release evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for accessible responsive game interface and settings flow after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evid…
objectives: Choose scalable fonts, line spacing, contrast, alignment, safe areas, localization space, and structured labels for essential text.
Support predictable keyboard and controller navigation, wrap policy, back, confirmation, cancellation, and no traps.
Render persistent non-color focus and announce or retain important state, errors, destructive actions, and setting changes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-asteroids-python cumulative accessible real-time game portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python simulation models and fixed fixtures only.
Native pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers,
GPU behavior, frame pacing, accessibility playtests, packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SimulationPolicy:
    fixed_step_seconds: float = 1 / 120
    max_frame_seconds: float = 0.1
    max_updates_per_frame: int = 8
    logical_width: int = 960
    logical_height: int = 540


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    revision: str
    seed: int
    input_trace_id: str
    runtime_id: str
    accessibility_profile: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Asteroids portfolio ready"

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Readable Text · changed case · Review Readable Text
steps.instruction:
review case — A review Asteroids team handles case 9916 during a keyboard-only community arcade night. Build deterministic Python evidence to build readable keyboard and controller menus, HUD, focus, status, multi-channel cues, text scaling, and reduced-motion options; keep browser work pure, deterministic, bounded, and free of native display, device, audio, file, package, and operating-system effects; then replace an audio-only collision cue with synchronized text, shape, and optional sound evidence. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. stimulus.title: Motion Photosensitivity case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A review Asteroids team handles case 5580 during a controller-remapping accessibility review. Build deterministic Python evidence to build readable keyboard and controller menus, HUD, focus, status, multi-channel cues, text scaling, and reduced-motion options; preserve explicit pixels, seconds, radians or degrees, frames, entity counts, collision units, and budgets; then run the packaged build with dummy video and audio drivers, missing optional sound, and a corrupted save. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Offer reduced motion and effects, avoid unsafe flashes, cap screen shake, allow pause, and preserve essential alternatives.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Retro flashing is harmless when individual flashes are short.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Offer reduced motion and effects, avoid unsafe flashes, cap screen shake, allow pause, and preserve essential alternatives. Artifact under review: accessible responsive game interface and settings flow.

options.text: For separate evidence from confidence, run one convenient high-frame-rate happy path, omit revision, seed, input and time trace, units, seams, device changes, entity reconciliation, multichannel cues, accessibility settings, failures, recovery, and desktop transfer, then accept a playable animation as Asteroids proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Motion Photosensitivity, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary.

Competency probe: Offer reduced motion and effects, avoid unsafe flashes, cap screen shake, allow pause, and preserve essential alternatives.

steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Offer reduced motion and effects, avoid unsafe flashes, cap screen shake, allow pause, and preserve essential alternatives.
